title: Smoky Wagyu Italian Stew
description: A hearty Italian-inspired stew featuring tender wagyu beef and a rich smoky flavor. Perfect for a cold evening.
instructions: Heat 2 tbsp of oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Sear the wagyu beef cubes until browned on all sides, then set aside.
Add the chopped onions to the pot and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the sliced carrots, diced tomatoes, German beer, Italian seasoning, salt, and pepper.
Stir to combine, then add the seared wagyu beef and stew.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then cover and transfer to the oven.
Braise the stew at 300°F for 2.5 hours, or until the beef is tender.
Remove from the oven and let rest for 10 minutes before serving.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley if desired.
Serve with crusty bread or over egg noodles for a heartier meal.
